text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Have you two decided what you're going to do
today?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Eh? Whyzzat? Is there something interesting
going on?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I don't have any plans other than training.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Then, how about we throw a hot pot party?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I haven't quite decided what kind of hot pot
would be best, however...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well if that's the case, how about we test our
mettle with a mystery hot pot?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, that sounds like fun too!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A mystery hot pot... I've heard rumblings about it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's a dish where both the edible and inedible are
all mixed together...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: L-let's skip the inedible things, shall we?
